text.title: rust-testing-ci-toolchain Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the rust-testing-ci-toolchain methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-tools-and-versions
step.action: Pin cargo-nextest, cargo-llvm-cov, cargo-miri (nightly) to current stable versions.

step.name: author-ci-workflow
step.action: Write .github/workflows/test.yml with test+miri jobs, cache, codecov upload.
step.decision-gate: If a hard coverage gate is requested, STOP and apply r2.

step.name: wire-renovate
step.action: Add Renovate config to update taiki-e/install-action package map.
